answer.en: XML Beautifier formats compact or minified XML by adding proper indentation and line breaks, making it easy to read and debug.

question.en: Is XML Beautifier the same as XML Formatter?

answer.en: Yes. XML Beautifier, XML Formatter, and XML Pretty Printer all refer to the same process of adding indentation for readability.
No. Only insignificant whitespace is added. The actual data and element structure remain unchanged.
Yes. All processing runs locally in your browser. Nothing is sent to any server.
